name: wauth-verifiable-intent
description: Govern AI-agent commerce through the WAUTH Verifiable-Intent doorkeeper — the agent presents a signed Verifiable-Intent mandate (the human's pre-authorised merchant, amount ceiling, item and validity); the doorkeeper verifies the order is inside that envelope and applies the merchant lock. Reads/quotes are free; placing an order within the mandate needs a passkey; over-threshold, a new payee, or a missing/invalid mandate needs passkey + iProov liveness. The agent never holds a payment credential.
